headlines.title: Philippine's Marcos to receive one of Japan's highest decorations
Japan AI shares follow US peers higher, driving Nikkei toward record high
Japan's Nikkei share average extends gain, last up 2.3%
Stocks rise, dollar at six-week high as focus remains on US-Iran talks
Nikkei 225 Forecast: Japan Stocks Eye 67,000 as Inflation Cools
Kioxia Holds Market Value Above 30 Trillion Yen to be Japan's Fourth-Largest Listed Firm; Shares Up 3%
Japanese Yen weakens on soft Japan CPI inflation data

marketTone.ko: 오늘 일본 증시는 강세를 보이며 닛케이 225 지수가 2.3% 상승, 사상 최고치에 근접했습니다. 이러한 상승세는 미국 증시를 따른 일본 AI 관련주들의 강세가 주요 동력으로 작용했습니다. 또한, 예상보다 부드러운 소비자물가지수(CPI) 발표로 엔화 약세가 심화된 점이 수출 기업에 긍정적인 영향을 미치며 닛케이 지수의 낙관적인 전망을 강화하는 촉매로 작용했습니다.
marketTone.en: Japanese equities posted strong gains today, with the Nikkei 225 extending its rally by 2.3% and approaching record highs. The market's upward momentum is largely driven by Japanese AI-related shares, mirroring trends seen in their US peers. Furthermore, a weakening Japanese Yen, influenced by softer CPI inflation data, acted as a significant catalyst, bolstering the outlook for export-oriented firms and contributing to the bullish forecast for the Nikkei.
